title: lepidium rekohuense
intro: Lepidium rekohuense, also known as Koukou or New Zealand pepperwort, is a flowering plant species in the genus Lepidium, characterized by its peppery flavor and medicinal properties. This plant has been traditionally used for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Lepidium rekohuense include its potential to alleviate colds, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as its ability to support digestion and reduce pain. Lepidium rekohuense can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
